query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  w.name as worker_name,
  a.demandId,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.scheduledHours,
  a.actualStart,
  a.actualEnd,
  a.actualHours,
  a.status
FROM assignments a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%孔仁琳%'
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:

  a.status
FROM assignments a

ORDER BY a.scheduledStart DESC
LIMIT 5;
